summary: Iteration 90 testing complete. Verified all 7 features/bugs from the review request: 1) BarristerView.jsx compiles without errors - yarn build succeeds with only ESLint warnings. 2) mergeAllReports uses ONLY single best entry per category - confirmed at lines 792-815, no supplement/append logic. 3) MERGE_CATEGORIES has expanded patterns for LODGE APPEAL, STEPS TO LODGE, CONVICTION ANALYSIS, NATURE OF CONVICTION, PATHWAY, NOTICE OF APPEAL - verified at lines 657-673. 4) Uncategorised sections are NOT added (line 815 comment confirms). 5) FAQ page category headings render correctly at mobile viewport (414px) - 7 category headers found with proper CSS classes. 6) All pages load without errors (Landing, How It Works, FAQ). 7) Backend health check works.

barrister_view_compilation.details: yarn build succeeds. Only ESLint warnings for missing useEffect dependencies (not errors). No 'return outside of function' error.

merge_all_reports_single_best_entry.details: Lines 792-815: Uses ONLY single best entry per category. Comments explicitly state 'NO supplementing, NO appending from lesser reports' and 'Use ONLY the single best entry — no merging, no appending'

merge_categories_expanded_patterns.details: Line 658: NATURE.*CONVICTION, CONVICTION.*ANALYSIS, CONVICTION.*OVERVIEW. Line 670: LODGE.*APPEAL, STEPS.*LODGE, NOTICE.*APPEAL, PATHWAY, COURT.*PATHWAY, OPERATIONS.*PLAYBOOK

uncategorised_sections_not_added.details: Line 815: Comment 'DO NOT add uncategorised sections — they create scattered duplicates' and no code adds uncategorised sections to finalSections

faq_category_headings_mobile.details: Tested at 414px viewport. Found 7 category headers with data-testid. CSS classes: 'flex items-center gap-3 mb-4 mt-2 pb-3 border-b-2 border-blue-600'. Icons present in each header.

all_pages_load.details: Landing page, How It Works, FAQ all load without console errors

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 90 verified all merge logic fixes in BarristerView.jsx. Key changes: 1) mergeAllReports now uses ONLY single best entry per category (no supplement/append logic). 2) MERGE_CATEGORIES expanded with patterns for LODGE APPEAL, STEPS TO LODGE, CONVICTION ANALYSIS, NATURE OF CONVICTION, PATHWAY, NOTICE OF APPEAL. 3) Uncategorised sections are NOT added to prevent scattered duplicates. 4) FAQ category headings render correctly at mobile viewport. Note: Barrister View cannot be fully tested end-to-end without actual case data and Emergent Google Auth login.
